name: Crispy Baked Fish & Herbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly spray a medium-sized shallow baking pan with vegetable spray.
3. Rinse the fish and pat dry.
4. In a small bowl, beat the egg white with a little water.
5. Dip each fillet in the egg mixture, then roll in cornflake crumbs.
6. Arrange the fish in the baking pan.
7. Sprinkle with lemon pepper and chopped parsley.
8. Drizzle margarine over all.
9. Bake uncovered for 20 minutes or until the fish flakes easily.
